info.description: API for SMS activations: get numbers, status, balance, prices, countries, services. All operations require api_key.
info.title: Client API - Grizzly SMS

get.description:
This endpoint handles various activation-related operations based on the 'action' query parameter. All actions require an 'api_key'. Other parameters depend on the action.

Actions:
- getNumber: Request a number
Parameters: service, country, maxPrice (optional), providerIds (optional), exceptProviderIds (optional)
Response: ACCESS_NUMBER:activation_id:phone_number or error
- setStatus: Activation status changes
Parameters: id, status
Response: ACCESS_READY, ACCESS_RETRY_GET, ACCESS_ACTIVATION, ACCESS_CANCEL or error
- getStatus: Get the activation status
Parameters: id
Response: STATUS_WAIT_CODE, STATUS_WAIT_RETRY:lastcode, STATUS_WAIT_RESEND, STATUS_CANCEL, STATUS_OK:code or error
- getStatusV2: Get the activation status (JSON)
Parameters: id
Response: JSON with verificationType, sms (dateTime, code, text), call (from, text, code, dateTime, url, parsingCount). Errors: NO_ACTIVATION, BAD_ACTION, ERROR_SQL
- getActiveActivations: Get list of active activations
Parameters: none
Response: JSON array of activation objects (activationId, serviceCode, phoneNumber, activationCost, activationStatus, smsCode, smsText, etc.)
- getBalance: Balance Request
Parameters: none additional
Response: ACCESS_BALANCE:balance or error
- getPrices: Get current prices by country
Parameters: service, country
Response: JSON object with prices or error
- getPricesV2: Get current prices v2
Parameters: service, country
Response: JSON object with prices or error
- getPricesV3: Get current prices v3
Parameters: service, country
Response: JSON object with prices or error
- getServicesList: Get services list
Parameters: none
Response: JSON array of services
- getCountries: Get countries list
Parameters: none
Response: JSON array of countries

Possible errors for all actions:
- BAD_KEY: Invalid API key
- BAD_ACTION: Incorrect action
- SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE_REGION: Access from your region is restricted
- Other action-specific errors as described

parameters.description: Service code (for getNumber, getPrices, getPricesV2, getPricesV3)
parameters.name: service

parameters.description: Country code (for getNumber, getPrices, getPricesV2, getPricesV3). Can be omitted or set to 'any' for any-country selection.
parameters.name: country
